impact_on_program.B2_still_open: U_res / residual can-core prefix-image bound still needed; budgets tighten by factor k_max=10 if K=M_m is only known via lower bound
impact_on_program.next: Determine exact M_m (or a tight upper bound), or bypass M_m by bounding N_can_prim / residual core-prefix image directly without uniqueness

B1_refuted.improved_lower_bound_reason: n-k*e0 >= m-e0 allows k <= 1+(n-m)/e0 = 10 cosets simultaneously disjoint from one R of size m-e0; all R cup U_i then share one Phi_w prefix.
B1_refuted.name: deployed_Mm_at_least_2_refutes_uniqueness
proof: By lemma_coset_locator and lemma_coset_free1_pencil, any two distinct e0-cosets form a CS pair.
Choose two cosets U,V and R subset D\\(U cup V) with |R|=m-e0 (possible because n-2*e0=1835008 >= m-e0=782560).
Apply lemma_padding_collision with e0 > w (in fact e0 >= w+1).
Hence Phi_w(R cup U)=Phi_w(R cup V) with R cup U != R cup V.
B1_refuted.statement: At deployed (n,m,w)=(2097152,913632,67471) with e0=131072=2^17 | n, the coset constant-shift padding construction produces at least two distinct m-subsets with the same depth-w monic prefix. Therefore M_m^{max} >= 2, and the B1 claim M_m^{max} <= 1 is FALSE.

coset_free1_pencil.name: all_e0_cosets_share_one_free1_prefix
proof: Immediate from Lambda_{gH} = X^{e0} - g^{e0}: only the constant term depends on g.
Different cosets are disjoint and partition D, so there are exactly n/e0 of them, matching the free-1 packing ceiling floor(n/e0)=n/e0.
coset_free1_pencil.statement: For e0 | n, every coset locator is of the form X^{e0} - a. Hence all n/e0 cosets share the same length-(e0-1) monic high-coefficient prefix (all zeros) and form a single free-1 fiber of size exactly n/e0.

coset_locator.name: coset_locator_is_pure_power
proof: The elements of gH are g, g zeta, ..., g zeta^{e0-1} where zeta = omega^{n/e0} has order e0.
coset_locator.statement: Let D = <omega> be cyclic of order n in F_p^x with n | (p-1). Let e0 | n and H = <omega^{n/e0}> the unique subgroup of order e0. For any coset gH, the monic locator is Lambda_{gH}(X) = X^{e0} - g^{e0}.

padding_collision.name: padding_CS_gives_depth_w_collision
proof: Lambda_S = Lambda_R Lambda_U and Lambda_T = Lambda_R Lambda_V, so Lambda_S - Lambda_T = Lambda_R (Lambda_U - Lambda_V) = c Lambda_R.
Hence deg(Lambda_S - Lambda_T) = deg(Lambda_R) = m - e0.

The first w monic high coefficients of a monic degree-m polynomial are the coefficients of X^{m-1},...,X^{m-w}. These vanish in the difference whenever deg(difference) <= m-w-1, i.e. m-e0 <= m-w-1, i.e. e0 >= w+1.

Under the weaker hypothesis e0 > w we have m-e0 < m-w, so coefficients of X^{m-1},...,X^{m-w} still vanish in the difference (deg <= m-e0 <= m-w-1 when e0 >= w+1; if only e0 > w then deg <= m-w-1 still holds for integer e0 >= w+1). For e0 > w, m-e0 <= m-w-1 iff e0 >= w+1. So we require e0 >= w+1.
padding_collision.statement: Let e0 >= 1, w < e0, and m >= e0 with n >= m + e0. Suppose U, V are disjoint e0-subsets of D whose monic locators differ by a nonzero constant c. Let R be any (m-e0)-subset of D\\(U cup V). Set S = R cup U and T = R cup V. Then |S|=|T|=m, S != T, and Phi_w(S)=Phi_w(T).

revised_criterion.name: atom_criterion_with_Mm_lower_bound
revised_criterion.statement: Since M_m^{max} >= 10, the v5 criterion requiring M_m <= 1 is impossible. The corrected sufficient condition is: if M_m^{{max}} <= K and U_res <= floor(target/(pack_ceil*K)) for some K >= M_m^{{max}}, then |R| <= target. Using only the proved lower bound, any proof must allow K >= 10, which tightens the U_res budget to <= floor(target/(17*10)).

title: B1 uniqueness REFUTED by coset CS padding; revised budgets
